title: arenaria tenera
intro: Arenaria tenera, also known as Sandwort, is a low-growing, mat-forming perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arenaria tenera include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Arenaria tenera can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
